question: A monitor is a type of ____________

options.a: a set of programmer defined operators
options.c: the number of variables in it

question: A procedure defined within a ________ can access only those variables declared locally within the _______ and its formal parameters.

options.a: only one process can be active at a time within the monitor
options.b: n number of processes can be active at a time within the monitor (n being greater than 1)
options.c: the queue has only one process in it at a time

question: What are the operations that can be invoked on a condition variable?
Which is the process of invoking the wait operation?

options.a: suspended until another process invokes the signal operation
options.b: waiting for another process to complete before it can itself call the signal operation
options.c: stopped until the next process in the queue finishes execution

question: If no process is suspended, the signal operation ____________

options.a: puts the system into a deadlock state
